page.title: Spaces
page.description: Discover spaces you can access. Join to collaborate, pin for quick access, or follow for updates.

form.name: Name
form.key_hint: Numbers this space’s issues — e.g. ENG-123. 1-7 uppercase letters or numbers, starting with a letter.
form.key_reserved: NEW is a reserved identifier — pick another one.
form.key_start_letter: The identifier must start with a letter.
form.key_rename_confirm_body: This space has {{count}} issue(s). Their identifiers change from {{oldKey}}-N to {{newKey}}-N. Existing {{oldKey}}-N links keep resolving.
form.key_hint_short: Used to number this space’s issues (e.g. ENG-123).
form.visibility_open_hint: Everyone in the workspace can discover and browse this space.
form.visibility_private_hint: Only invited members and workspace admins can access this space.
form.visibility_default_hint: The workspace default space must remain open.

overview.leave_confirm_description: You will leave {{name}} and it will disappear from your Sidebar. A Space manager can add you again later.

settings.title: Settings
settings.context_hint: Shared operating guidance for Agent runs in this Space. It is added after Workspace Context and does not grant access.
settings.context_placeholder: Add domain knowledge, conventions, ownership boundaries, or links Agents should use in this Space…
settings.activity_hint: Space lifecycle and Integration binding changes are recorded here.
settings.activity_space_archived: archived this Space ({{squads}} Squads archived, {{autopilots}} Autopilots paused)
settings.activity_space_restored: restored this Space ({{squads}} Squads restored, {{autopilots}} Autopilots awaiting confirmation)
settings.archive_hint: Archiving stops new work, archives Squads, and pauses active Autopilots. Existing issues stay readable.
settings.archive_confirm_body: {{name}} will stop accepting new work. Its Squads will be archived and active Autopilots paused; existing issues stay readable.
settings.restore_hint: Restoring makes the Space and its Squads active again. Autopilots remain paused until you confirm separately.
settings.restore_confirm_body: Restore {{name}} and the Squads archived with it?
settings.resume_confirm_body: {{count}} Autopilot(s) were paused when this Space was archived. Review the Space, then choose whether to resume them now.
settings.last_space_cannot_archive: A workspace must keep at least one space
settings.default_space_cannot_archive: Choose another default space before archiving this one
settings.archive_admin_only: Only space leads and admins can archive a space
